plan_summary.primary_goal: Legally partition Earth along the equator within 24 months: 85% critical infrastructure severance, 95% priority demographic relocation, hybrid IOB governance.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether the 24-month $12T front-loaded allocation covers severance and Northern stabilization while meeting the 85% Wave 1 severance, 95% relocation, 90% IOB transfer, 13k/km^2 density, and 10% machine energy contribution gates.

key_values.label: Initial 24-month budget allocation
key_values.comment: Front-loaded capital that must cover severance plus Northern stabilization in the first 24 months.

key_values.label: Total project budget envelope
key_values.comment: Full $30T envelope; the residual after the $12T tranche backstops post-Month-24 stabilization.
key_values.source_text: Total project budget baseline: $30 Trillion USD

key_values.label: Legal partition deadline
key_values.comment: Hard deadline for legal partition completion; sets the denominator for monthly burn.

key_values.label: Wave 1 severance verification target
key_values.comment: 85% handover verification gate; falling short blocks Wave 2 and jeopardizes the deadline.
key_values.source_text: Wave N+1 starts upon 85% handover verification of Wave N

key_values.label: Priority relocation completion target
key_values.comment: 95% of designated personnel must cross the boundary by Month 24 for SMART completion.
key_values.source_text: verified successful relocation of 95% of all designated personnel populations

key_values.label: Northern hub density cap (planning)
key_values.comment: Conservative planning ceiling; exceeding it for 30+ days breaches the humane mandate.
key_values.source_text: North density cap used for risk modelling: 13,000 persons/km^2

key_values.label: Mandated machine energy contribution share
key_values.comment: 10% of total energy output the machine domain must contribute for climate stabilization.
key_values.source_text: Required machine energy contribution: ten percent of total energy output

key_values.label: IOB dissolution infrastructure transfer threshold
key_values.comment: If 90% of designated transfers are not certified by Month 24, the IOB dissolves.
key_values.source_text: If 90% of designated infrastructure transfers are not certified complete by Month 24, the Oversight Body dissolves

derived_questions.question: What monthly burn does the front-loaded $12T imply across the 24-month mandate?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Sets the cash baseline for severance, stabilization, and replacement-labor planning.

derived_questions.question: Does certified infrastructure transfer clear the 90% IOB-dissolution threshold?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Negative margin triggers automatic IOB dissolution and blocks bilateral negotiation.

derived_questions.question: Do Northern hubs stay below the 13k persons/km^2 planning cap?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Negative margin for 30+ days breaches the humane relocation mandate and forces modular housing acceleration.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Total demographic headcount requiring relocation
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Denominator for the 95% relocation gate and logistical throughput sizing across the 24-month window.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Audit population registries south of 3 degrees S and north of 3 degrees N requiring transfer.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual Wave 1 verification share achieved
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against the 85% target to determine whether subsequent severance waves can commence.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Monte Carlo dependency-mapping simulation of cascading failure for the M8 cutoff with +/-30 day slip.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Total 24-month severance plus stabilization cost
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against the $12T front-loaded allocation to test budget adequacy and reserve health.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum replacement-labor cost, modular-housing capex, severance contract caps, and IOB operating cost over 24 months.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual machine energy contribution share
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against the 10% target to determine whether IOB funds for Northern stabilization continue.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Audit metered Southern energy output billed to the climate stabilization account over rolling 90-day windows.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual peak Northern hub population density
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tested against the 13k/km^2 cap to determine whether the humane relocation mandate is breached.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Project influx volumes and modular housing deployment schedule onto the five largest Northern consolidation hubs.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Front-loaded budget surplus after 24-month execution
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the $12T tranche covers severance plus stabilization; negative surplus signals reserve raid.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Wave 1 verification margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin lets Wave 2 proceed; negative blocks subsequent waves and jeopardises the 24-month deadline.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Machine energy contribution margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps IOB stabilization funds flowing; sustained negative halts them.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Required relocated headcount to meet 95% gate
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Translates the 95% SMART gate into an absolute logistics target for corridor throughput planning.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Post-Month-24 reserve buffer
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Quantifies remaining envelope to absorb overruns and post-partition stabilization commitments.

unmodelled_gates.label: Machine civilization independent viability south of 3 degrees S
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The partition premise assumes the machine domain can sustain energy and compute below 3 degrees S without Northern input; the model treats this as a fixed assumption rather than a probabilistic test.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Physical separation premise collapses; partition reverts to managed co-dependency and the 24-month deadline becomes meaningless.

unmodelled_gates.label: Hybrid IOB charter ratification by Month 15
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Permanent hybrid Arbitration Panel must be ratified by Month 15 for legitimate post-Month-24 governance; the model cannot quantify political ratification probability.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Dispute resolution defaults to a single emergency arbiter and the bilateral negotiation pathway is blocked.

unmodelled_gates.label: Civilian welfare continuity (food, water, power)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Severance must not interrupt civilian food, water, or power; this is a binding non-coercion compliance gate not captured in any financial threshold.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: The non-coercive constraint of the treaty is violated and the entire Builder mandate loses legitimacy.

unmodelled_gates.label: Sovereign Sensor Trust sub-50ms latency for 99.99% of streams
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Corridor governance fails if real-time sensor feeds breach the latency SLA; the deterministic model does not simulate network performance.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Sensor Trust fails as the corridor-dispute resolution layer, reintroducing kinetic-escalation risk.

unmodelled_gates.label: Global airspace and resource-sharing legal waivers
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Demographic transport at planetary scale requires airspace waivers and resource-sharing treaties the model treats as granted.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Logistical relocation cannot proceed at the scale required to hit the 95% relocation gate by Month 24.
